plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the full plan for creating `@ai-sdk/pixelart`:

---

## What will be built

A new `packages/pixelart/` package ‚Äî **16 new files**, plus **one line added** to the root `tsconfig.json`. No existing provider packages are touched.

### Package layout (mirrors `packages/luma`)
```
packages/pixelart/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ src/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.ts                        # exports
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ version.ts                      # build-injected VERSION
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pixelart-provider.ts            # createPixelArt() factory + PixelArtProvider interface
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pixelart-image-model.ts         # PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pixelart-image-settings.ts      # PixelArtImageModelId + PixelArtImageSettings types
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pixelart-image-model.test.ts    # unit tests
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ pixelart-provider.test.ts       # unit tests
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ package.json                        # @ai-sdk/pixelart v0.0.0
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ tsconfig.json / tsconfig.build.json
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ tsup.config.ts                      # CJS + ESM build
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ turbo.json / vitest.*.config.js
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ README.md / CHANGELOG.md
```

### Key design decisions
| Concern | Decision |
|---|---|
| Factory | `createPixelArt(options?)` returns `PixelArtProvider`; `pixelArt` is the default singleton |
| API key | `options.apiKey` ‚Üí `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var |
| Base URL | `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1`, endpoint `POST /images/generations` |
| `size` / `seed` | Standard call options, forwarded to API as-is |
| `style` / `pixelDensity` | Provider-specific, in `providerOptions.pixelart`, validated via Zod (`style: 'pixel'|'retro'|'8bit'`, `pixelDensity: 1‚Äì16`) |
| `aspectRatio` / `files` / `mask` | Unsupported ‚Üí emit `SharedV3Warning` |
| `languageModel()` / `embeddingModel()` | Throw `NoSuchModelError` |
| Response | JSON with `images[].b64_json`, returned as `string[]` |
| Polling | None ‚Äî synchronous single-request API (simpler than Luma) |

### Utilities reused (no new code needed)
`loadApiKey`, `withoutTrailingSlash`, `withUserAgentSuffix`, `combineHeaders`, `postJsonToApi`, `createJsonResponseHandler`, `createJsonErrorResponseHandler`, `parseProviderOptions`, `lazySchema`, `zodSchema` ‚Äî all from `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`.
